evidence.snippet: ESC drone: the new version of Centurion!

With the release of [**version 2 of ESC Centurion**](https://dronefrancais.fr/en/produit/esc-centurionv2-4en1-3-a-6s-65a/)the [**Drone Français**](https://dronefrancais.fr/en/) confirms its ambition to build a **sovereign**, high-performance **industry** tailored to the needs of integrators. More powerful, better protected, and still **100% made in France**, this new version is aimed at those who want to combine technological independence, industrial robustness and optimized performance.

items.notes: ESC Centurion v2 is 4-in-1 Electronic Speed Controller for drones, 100% made in France

evidence.snippet: An **[ESC](https://dronefrancais.fr/en/produit/esc-centurionv2-4en1-3-a-6s-65a/) (Electronic Speed Controller)** is an electronic component that controls the speed of a drone's brushless motors. It receives instructions from the [**flight controller**](https://dronefrancais.fr/en/produit/carte-de-vol/) (flight controller), then modulates the intensity of the current transmitted to each motor. It ensures flight stability, agile maneuvering and responsiveness, even in demanding environments or in the face of sudden load variations.

evidence.snippet: An **[ESC](https://dronefrancais.fr/en/produit/esc-centurionv2-4en1-3-a-6s-65a/) (Electronic Speed Controller)** is an electronic component that controls the speed of a drone's brushless motors. It receives instructions from the [**flight controller**](https://dronefrancais.fr/en/produit/carte-de-vol/) (flight controller), then modulates the intensity of the current transmitted to each motor. It ensures flight stability, agile maneuvering and responsiveness, even in demanding environments or in the face of sudden load variations.

items.notes: Referenced in ESC article; also Abell is the product name per article URLs in crawl_index

products.notes: Store and design office pages were skipped; additional products (Abell flight controller, GPS, Uriel FPV drone, Drone Side, LED panel) inferred from crawl_index product URLs

evidence.snippet: With local production, rigorous quality control, French-speaking technical support, and complete transparency of the supply chain, this component is part of a strategic dynamic.

[**Drone Français**](https://dronefrancais.fr/en/) demonstrates that **sovereign innovation is possible**, even in a field as competitive as on-board electronics for drones. More powerful, more robust, better protected, the Centurion v2 is aimed at all integrators, designers and manufacturers who want to make the **Made in France** choice without compromising on quality.

readiness.notes: Products available in online store with ordering; claims local production and 100% made in France

tagline: French-based supplier of integrated propulsion and flight-control electronics for small unmanned systems, including the ESC Centurion v2 (4-in-1, 65A continuous) and Carte de vol flight controller. Production-ready. NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification status not publicly disclosed; limited open-source evidence of US prime integration or contract wins.
